name: Opus SoundBed
blurb: A full-body vibro-acoustic bed with transducers mapped to the body's energy centers — head, heart, belly, root, feet. Sound becomes something you feel in the bones, not just hear.

name: Immortal
blurb: A reclined vibro-acoustic system for deep nervous-system regulation — low-frequency waves carried through the whole body for rest, recovery, and coherence.

name: BioHarmonix Shift Wave
blurb: A resonance chair that pairs sound and pressure waves to move the body out of fight-or-flight in minutes — a fast doorway into a parasympathetic, settled state.
